title: Creation and promotion of Forest and Agriculture Networks to boost Bio-Based Technologies adoption and Value Chain development
description: BBioNets is a Coordination and Support Action funded by Horizon Europe that establishes regional Forest and Agriculture Networks in six European countries to promote adoption of Bio-Based Technologies and sustainable value chain development. It engages stakeholders through workshops, mutual learning exchanges, and assessment tools to foster circular economy practices, greenhouse gas mitigation, and cross-regional collaboration.
